findings.description: W11BB02Form class definition is omitted. Source shows the concrete Java fields: `private String loginId`, `private String userKanjiName`, `private String userKanaName`, `private String groupId`. While the SQL bind variable names in s2 imply these field names, the explicit Form class definition that confirms the Java field-to-bind-variable mapping is absent from s5.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `public class W11BB02Form { /** ログインID */ private String loginId; /** 漢字氏名 */ private String userKanjiName; /** カナ氏名 */ private String userKanaName; /** グループID */ private String groupId; }`

findings.location: s4 (like条件をもつ簡易検索の場合)
findings.description: PascalCase class names `W11BB01Form` and `SqlResultSet` appear in the s4 code example but are absent from s4's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code in like条件 section: `W11BB01Form form = new W11BB01Form();` and `SqlResultSet rs = select.retrieve(form);`
